name: Postman ASG Aura Sky Grid Control Layer
purpose: SkyGrid / Aura-Core control-layer API testing, route validation, health checks, and proof workflow integration.
reviewChecklist: Export the Postman request or collection as JSON before automated integration.
Confirm method, URL, headers, body schema, and auth type.
Move any tokens to GitHub Actions or Vercel environment variables, never committed files.
Create a mock/sandbox response before production calls.
Confirm CORS and origin requirements if called from the site.
Add redaction for Authorization, cookies, wallet signatures, and API keys.
Log only request IDs, status codes, latency, and safe metadata.
